tall.heading: Block ratio 12:16
tall.text: Renders blocks with a tall 12:16 portrait ratio, with images, dates displayed inline and as a badge.

square.heading: Block ratio 4:3
square.text: Renders blocks with a standard 4:3 landscape ratio, with images and an optional link.

gutter.heading: Block ratio 4:3, without spacing between blocks
gutter.text: Renders blocks inside an o-grid--no-gutter container, which removes border radius and drop shadow from adjacent blocks.

noimg.heading: Block without a image
noimg.text: Renders blocks without images, demonstrating meta as a plain string, meta as an array of tags, and optional link behaviour.

with-content.heading: Block with content text and secondary meta
with-content.text: Renders blocks with the content parameter (descriptive body text) and secondaryMeta shown beneath the primary meta.

with-icon.heading: Block with icon
with-icon.text: Renders blocks with an icon placed next to the heading, optionally wrapped in a coloured circle via iconBackgroundColor.

widescreen.heading: Block ratio 16:9
widescreen.text: Renders blocks with a wide 16:9 landscape ratio, suitable for video thumbnails and cinematic imagery.

ratio-1-1.heading: Block ratio 1:1
ratio-1-1.text: Renders blocks with a square 1:1 ratio, suitable for symmetric visual layouts and profile-style imagery.
